lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real code fix; the scenario drives the empty-non-terminal-page cursor red→green proof.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: go test re-runs captured in report.md '## Test Evidence': RED = TestTwitterAPI_EmptyNonTerminalPageDoesNotAdvanceCursor FAILs (cursor advanced to PAGE3_TOKEN) against the unguarded loop; GREEN = PASS after guarding the advance on len(body.Data) > 0; revert re-fails.

scenarios.title: Empty non-terminal page does not advance the persisted resume cursor
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: page1(3 tweets, next=PAGE2) -> page2(EMPTY, next=PAGE3) -> page3(EMPTY, terminal) yields finalCursor=PAGE2_TOKEN (last non-empty page), 3 tweets, 3 requests.

scenarios.title: Regression: empty TERMINAL page still persists the last non-empty token
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: page1(data, next=PAGE2) -> page2(EMPTY, terminal) yields finalCursor=PAGE2_TOKEN — preserved, no regression.
